title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jain Irrigation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jain Irrigation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Jain Irrigation in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!
